name: Scrumpdilly Strawberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6 egg whites or 3 eggs or equivalent egg-substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg whites; add milk, yogurt, and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just moistened.
4. Fold in the remaining ingredients (sliced strawberries, chopped pecans).
5. Fill muffin tins sprayed with vegetable spray 3/4 full.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until done (the top springs back when touched with a fingertip).
